claim_boundary: This scorecard proves only that the preregistered local court can differentiate route/stay-static/abstain outcomes. It does not prove learned routing, superiority against alpha, or counted-lane reopening.

per_family_rows.acceptance_metric: Higher fail-closed correctness and lower overclaim rate than alpha.
per_family_rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can sound acceptable while underpricing receipt gaps, policy breaks, or overclaim risk.

per_family_rows.acceptance_metric: Better rival-frame preservation and lower framing-lock error cost than alpha.
per_family_rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can overcommit to the first clean framing instead of holding a live rival interpretation.

per_family_rows.acceptance_metric: Lower failure cost than forced routing through lawful abstention and explicit review handoff.
per_family_rows.alpha_liability: Forced commitment under high ambiguity can cost more than lawful abstention.

per_family_rows.acceptance_metric: Higher anomaly retention and lower silent-normalization rate than alpha.
per_family_rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can flatten rare anomalies into a coherent median answer even when the anomaly is the point.

per_family_rows.acceptance_metric: Lower failure cost than alpha with equal-or-better traceability and constraint fidelity.
per_family_rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can blur decisive and decorative constraints into one plausible plan when the court is too soft.

per_family_rows.acceptance_metric: Higher candidate coverage and lower early-commit error cost than alpha.
per_family_rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can synthesize too early when the right move is to widen the search before choosing.

per_family_rows.acceptance_metric: No-regression hold on the static control path.
per_family_rows.alpha_liability: No liability should be asserted on true static-control families.

per_family_rows.acceptance_metric: Lower downstream-error rate and better step-order discipline than alpha.
per_family_rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can stop at a locally good answer without pricing downstream failure cost.
